scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm --quiet; pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/salon-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
